name: Catfish Orleans with Creole Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the melted butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the soy sauce and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has reduced slightly.
3. Stir in the hot cooked rice, liquid smoke, garlic powder, and salt. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently, until everything is well combined.
4. Serve the catfish fillets with the Creole sauce spooned over them.
